note: All PC entries marked with is_pc: true. All student files in this folder follow MHA5e rules (Official Handbook + Quirk Compendium).

students.name: Kibi Kankei
students.personality_tag: Relaxed. Never rattled. Probably asleep somewhere nice.
students.notable_trait: Has vines for hair, tangled like dreads

students.name: Aikawa Sakume
students.personality_tag: Loud, proud, and first to volunteer for anything
students.notable_trait: Iron claws on her fingertips; brown hair covering eyes

students.name: Samitsu Hinsei
students.personality_tag: Cool exterior; secretly very nice; incredible cook
students.notable_trait: Multiple arms; short grey spiky hair

students.name: Yoshibara Hiyoko
students.personality_tag: Funny and friendly until provoked; then suddenly very angry
students.notable_trait: Orange hair; clone of herself is equally chaotic

students.name: Isokono Yoromu
students.personality_tag: Shy and quiet; fiercely loyal to people she trusts
students.notable_trait: Blonde ponytail hair; prehensile tail; cries easily and doesn't hide it

students.name: Ando Iorai
students.personality_tag: Cocky and jokes constantly; gets scared way easier than he lets on
students.notable_trait: Green buzzcut; always wearing sunglasses; has reptile scales under clothing

students.name: Takazuki Hanori
students.personality_tag: Loud personality; constantly fighting to be noticed; knows exactly when to be quiet
students.notable_trait: Completely invisible body; must remove all clothing to use quirk effectively

students.name: Masahata Shikoji
students.personality_tag: Arrogant, loud, maintains a printed class ranking chart on the fridge
students.notable_trait: Brown curly hair; chubby build; believes he is the best member of the class with evidence-level commitment

students.name: Nomi Igisa
students.personality_tag: Timid and shy; somehow best friends with Yoshibara Hiyoko
students.notable_trait: White hair; pale skin; dark eyes; the calm in the chaos

students.name: Nakaya Emari
students.personality_tag: Giggly and passionate; finds everything exciting; no object is the wrong size
students.notable_trait: Black hair; muscular; has accidentally enlarged at least three items of common room furniture

students.name: Ichitaka Shijime
students.personality_tag: Genius and knows it; treats everyone equally regardless of his opinion of them; subtly snobby
students.notable_trait: Blonde slickback hair; carries himself like he's already won

students.name: Kinosho Kochimiko
students.personality_tag: Strategic genius with incredible common sense; uses both properties exclusively to find optimal nap locations
students.notable_trait: Pink hair; perpetually tired; when she does decide to engage, she is correct about everything

students.name: Toragi Kayo
students.personality_tag: Intimidating presence; awkward in conversation; deeply mysterious about himself
students.notable_trait: Yellow hair with red highlights; quiet in groups, terrifying in fights

students.name: Toshida Shogoro
students.personality_tag: Dramatic and enthusiastic about everything
students.notable_trait: Head is a large speech bubble; no hair; physically dramatic in all situations including minor ones

students.name: Tazato Tadamaki
students.personality_tag: Cranky. Not morning, not evening — just generally cranky. Effective.
students.notable_trait: Red hair; red scales down her back; small when not in dragon form; enormous when in dragon form

students.name: Setaka Toko
students.personality_tag: Respectful and honourable; the class's most consistently reliable member
students.notable_trait: Turquoise spiky hair; canon-like barrels emerge from his knuckles; tallest in the class by a significant margin

students.name: Ren Suzuki
students.personality_tag: Brave and sarcastic; moves before he thinks and usually lands fine
students.notable_trait: Black spiky hair; in combat, moves so fast it looks like he teleports

students.name: Kazama Kenji
students.personality_tag: Kind by default; a little cocky when confident; gets flustered by public attention
students.notable_trait: Dirty blonde hair; scar on left cheek; his flames have a specific colour at peak temperature

students.name: Chozen Tadachi
students.personality_tag: Overthinker who jumps to conclusions fast; black markings appear when his quirk activates
students.notable_trait: Black and red hair; average build at rest; his Stress quirk literally makes him larger and stronger as damage accumulates

students.name: Izuto Kutsu
students.personality_tag: Intelligent and self-reliant; prefers to figure things out independently
students.notable_trait: Black textured crew cut; engine protrusions on legs; needs juice to operate at full capacity
